folio.label: 111r
folio.l: Othere than this , god of his heye myracle
And of his mäcy , may so for ©ow werche
That er ©e han , ©oure rigútis of holichirche
ñe may repent , of wedded ma~nys lyf
In whicú ©e seyn , there nys no woo ne strif´
And elles god forbede , but he sent
A wedded man , hym grace to repent
Wel oft rather , than a sengle man
And æäfore sire , the best red that I can
Despeire ©ow nougút , but haue in ©oure memorie
îauenture she may , be ©oure purgatorie
She may be goddis meene , and goddis whip~
Than shal ©oure soule , vp to heuene skip~
Swiftere than an arwe , dotú out of a bowe
I hope to god , here after shuln~ ©e knowe
That there nys noon , so gret felicite
In mariage , ne neuäe more shal be
That ©ow shal lette , of ©oure sauaciouö
So that ©e vse , as skyl is and resouö
The lustes of ©oure wyf , attemprely
Take hem nat ofte , but mesurabely

note.notetxt: 436/athe first part until the virgule is lighter than the second one.ODR

folio.l: And that ©e kepyn ©ow , eke , from other synne
My tale is dou~ , for my wyt is thynne
Betú nat a gast , here of , my brother dere
But late vs waden , out of this matere
The wyf of Bathe , if ©e han vnderstonde
Of mariage , whicú we han oon honde
Declared , hatú , ful wel in litel space
Faretú now wel , god haue ©ow in his grace
¢ And witú that word , this Iustinë & his brother
Han tan here leue , and ecú of hem of other
For whan they saugú , that it must nedes be
They wrougúten so , by sleyte and wys tretee
That she this Mayde , whicú that Mayus higút
As hastily , as euäe that she mygút
Shal wedded be , vn to this Ianuarie
I trowe it were , to longe ©ow to tarie
If I ©ow told , of euäy script and bond
By whicú that she , was feffed in his lond
Or for to rekken , of hire riche a ray
But finally , I comen is that day
That to the chirche , bothe be they went
For to resceyue , the holy sacrament
Fortú cometú the prest , witú stole a boute his nekke
And bad hire be lyke , Sarra and Rebekke
In wysdom , and in trouthe of mariage
And seide hise orisouns , as is vsage
And crouched hem , and bad god shuld hem blis

note.notetxt: 436last lines are crammedin f.111.The ink in this folio seems to be darker, I would say brown, but at the beginning it is not as dark. Check how many linesODR
